category_sources: source_facts.description says feature-rich top tool for monitoring MySQL; official README at https://github.com/charles-001/dolphie#readme describes real-time analytics for MySQL, MariaDB, and ProxySQL.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dolphie; official README title uses Dolphie.
docs_sources: No separate docs site found; official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with install, usage, supported databases, grants, and replay mode.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/charles-001/dolphie; official GitHub repository hosts the source and README.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies MySQL monitoring; official README documents MySQL, MariaDB, ProxySQL, terminal usage, and Textual-style TUI behavior.
